hero_desc: Create rental contracts, fill government forms, automate document workflows. 100% free, processed locally on your computer, absolutely secure.
section_tools_desc: Choose the document type you need. Fill in the details, preview, and export as professional PDF.
tool_contract_desc: Create professional rental contracts with 4 templates: house, apartment, office, commercial space. Export as legal-standard PDF.
tool_ct01_desc: Fill the CT01 residence change form online. Supports temporary and permanent registration. Export as standard PDF.
tool_invoice_desc: Create professional sales invoices. Enter company info, customer details, item list and export as PDF for printing or storage.
tool_military_desc: Generate a complete set of 6 document templates. Enter data once, export Word files with 100% original formatting.
tool_bundle_desc: Upload a folder of Word files, fill once, export all files automatically. Save time on multi-document projects.
tool_invitation_desc: Create invitations, minutes, and documents with lists. App auto-detects attendee lists — add/remove people flexibly.
footer_desc: Free document creation tool. Fill CT01 forms, create rental contracts, automate document workflows. Secure, 100% local processing.
footer_copyright: © 2026 DocMaker. Free. All data processed 100% on your computer.
saved_templates_hint: Click to reuse — no need to upload again!
saved_sessions_hint: Click to continue editing (data already filled)
list_groups_detected: Detected {count} list groups — add/remove as needed
invitation_desc: Upload your Word template → app auto-detects lists → add/remove people flexibly → export file
invitation_upload_desc: App will auto-detect attendee lists and task assignments in your file.
invitation_upload_note: No need to modify your template — upload as-is!
feature_free_desc: No hidden fees, no usage limits.
feature_secure_desc: Data processed entirely on your computer, never sent online.
feature_fast_desc: Create documents in minutes instead of hours.
